content:
1.  I started playing Morimens just a week ago and funnily enough I found it from recommendation from DeepSeek hhh
2. I cannot express how much I love this game it's a hidden gem in world of gacha!! Music, art, story everything is just so soooo goood!! 
3. I'm most excited about new chapters and characters, and music and everything tbh!!
4. Thank you for being so open about game developement it's so rare! I really appreciate that you care about community and you are very open about not only amazing moments in game but also struggles that your team have sometimes.
5. I want to say huge THANK YOU to the whole team who works on Morimens. You created such a gem that you deserve all praising. Developers, artists, composers, management - thank you all that you don't give up during hard times and keep going with your amazing creation!! I wish you all that you will always have inspiration and support in everything that you do! P.s. and special thanks for Doll - she's my favourite character and I love her so much 💖
